<content>
1: package docker
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"fmt"
5: 
6: 	"github.com/traefik/traefik/v3/pkg/config/label"
7: )
8: 
9: const (
10: 	labelDockerComposeProject = "com.docker.compose.project"
11: 	labelDockerComposeService = "com.docker.compose.service"
12: )
13: 
14: // configuration Contains information from the labels that are globals (not related to the dynamic configuration)
15: // or specific to the provider.
16: type configuration struct {
17: 	Enable bool
18: 	Docker specificConfiguration
19: }
20: 
21: type specificConfiguration struct {
22: 	Network string
23: 	LBSwarm bool
24: }
25: 
26: func (p *Shared) extractLabels(container dockerData) (configuration, error) {
27: 	conf := configuration{
28: 		Enable: p.ExposedByDefault,
29: 		Docker: specificConfiguration{
30: 			Network: p.Network,
31: 		},
32: 	}
33: 
34: 	err := label.Decode(container.Labels, &conf, "traefik.docker.", "traefik.enable")
35: 	if err != nil {
36: 		return configuration{}, err
37: 	}
38: 
39: 	return conf, nil
40: }
41: 
42: // getStringMultipleStrict get multiple string values associated to several labels.
43: // Fail if one label is missing.
44: func getStringMultipleStrict(labels map[string]string, labelNames ...string) (map[string]string, error) {
45: 	foundLabels := map[string]string{}
46: 	for _, name := range labelNames {
47: 		value := getStringValue(labels, name, "")
48: 		// Error out only if one of them is not defined.
49: 		if len(value) == 0 {
50: 			return nil, fmt.Errorf("label not found: %s", name)
51: 		}
52: 		foundLabels[name] = value
53: 	}
54: 	return foundLabels, nil
55: }
56: 
57: // getStringValue get string value associated to a label.
58: func getStringValue(labels map[string]string, labelName, defaultValue string) string {
59: 	if value, ok := labels[labelName]; ok && len(value) > 0 {
60: 		return value
61: 	}
62: 	return defaultValue
63: }

(End of file - total 63 lines)
